## markdown-it-wikilinks package

Framework-free markdown-it wikilink rendering and host integration contracts.

## Functions

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[createWikilinkHref(target, options)](./markdown-it-wikilinks.createwikilinkhref.md)


</td><td>

Builds a wikilink destination without decoding existing percent escapes.

`http`<!-- -->, `https`<!-- -->, `mailto`<!-- -->, and `tel` destinations pass through unchanged. Other schemes are rejected with a harmless fragment destination.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[wikilinks(options)](./markdown-it-wikilinks.wikilinks.md)


</td><td>

Creates a markdown-it plugin that renders escaped, ordinary HTML anchors.

The root entry performs no filesystem access and emits no framework-specific components. Filesystem tooltip discovery belongs to the `./node` adapter.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
